## Meeting Purpose

[Evaluate GrowthX as a potential solution for scaling Auror's content marketing efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/nA3yHzH6Bx5oJsA4JUibAHzqABCHuzyn?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Auror is exploring solutions to scale content creation across multiple geos, audiences (retail/law enforcement), and buyer journey stages](https://fathom.video/share/nA3yHzH6Bx5oJsA4JUibAHzqABCHuzyn?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
  - [GrowthX offers a team-based approach with AI-powered workflows, focusing on high-quality editorial content as a foundation](https://fathom.video/share/nA3yHzH6Bx5oJsA4JUibAHzqABCHuzyn?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
  - [GrowthX's process involves a 6-8 week strategy sprint ($20k) followed by longer-term engagement for content production and distribution](https://fathom.video/share/nA3yHzH6Bx5oJsA4JUibAHzqABCHuzyn?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)
  - [Next steps: Follow-up demo of GrowthX platform and deeper discussion scheduled for Wednesday at 9:30am PT](https://fathom.video/share/nA3yHzH6Bx5oJsA4JUibAHzqABCHuzyn?tab=summary&timestamp=2108.0)

## Topics

### Auror's Current Situation and Needs

  - [\~250 employees, recently added marketing headcount (Camille joined in October)](https://fathom.video/share/nA3yHzH6Bx5oJsA4JUibAHzqABCHuzyn?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [Global company (NZ, Australia, UK, US, Canada) in scale-up stage](https://fathom.video/share/nA3yHzH6Bx5oJsA4JUibAHzqABCHuzyn?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Selling retail crime intelligence software to retailers and expanding into law enforcement](https://fathom.video/share/nA3yHzH6Bx5oJsA4JUibAHzqABCHuzyn?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [Conducted 52 events last year, now looking to scale content efforts efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/nA3yHzH6Bx5oJsA4JUibAHzqABCHuzyn?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [Evaluating AI workflow platforms (Tofu, Velocity Engine) and agency models like GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/nA3yHzH6Bx5oJsA4JUibAHzqABCHuzyn?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
  - [Key metrics: Revenue, targeting top 150 retailers, supporting sales, improving SEO visibility](https://fathom.video/share/nA3yHzH6Bx5oJsA4JUibAHzqABCHuzyn?tab=summary&timestamp=539.0)

### GrowthX's Approach and Offerings

  - [Team-based model with dedicated roles (Chief Content Officer, Managing Directors, Managing Editors)](https://fathom.video/share/nA3yHzH6Bx5oJsA4JUibAHzqABCHuzyn?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Two-phase approach: 6-8 week strategy sprint ($20k) followed by longer-term engagement](https://fathom.video/share/nA3yHzH6Bx5oJsA4JUibAHzqABCHuzyn?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)
  - [Developed own platform after initially using Airtable and Aeros for workflow management](https://fathom.video/share/nA3yHzH6Bx5oJsA4JUibAHzqABCHuzyn?tab=summary&timestamp=1120.0)
  - [Focus on editorial content as foundation, expanding to distribution channels (social, email, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/nA3yHzH6Bx5oJsA4JUibAHzqABCHuzyn?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
  - [Provides end-to-end service including SEO research, content creation, images, and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/nA3yHzH6Bx5oJsA4JUibAHzqABCHuzyn?tab=summary&timestamp=2029.0)

### GrowthX's Process and Deliverables

  - [Strategy sprint includes persona development, writing guidelines, content refresh examples](https://fathom.video/share/nA3yHzH6Bx5oJsA4JUibAHzqABCHuzyn?tab=summary&timestamp=1532.0)
  - [Creates "Content OS" with 6-month roadmap of content opportunities and briefs](https://fathom.video/share/nA3yHzH6Bx5oJsA4JUibAHzqABCHuzyn?tab=summary&timestamp=1763.0)
  - [Emphasizes calibration and feedback to maintain consistent high-quality output](https://fathom.video/share/nA3yHzH6Bx5oJsA4JUibAHzqABCHuzyn?tab=summary&timestamp=1734.0)
  - [Moving towards integrating more data points (traffic, revenue) into content planning](https://fathom.video/share/nA3yHzH6Bx5oJsA4JUibAHzqABCHuzyn?tab=summary&timestamp=1951.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [ThinkLP identified as Auror's main competitor in the US market](https://fathom.video/share/nA3yHzH6Bx5oJsA4JUibAHzqABCHuzyn?tab=summary&timestamp=2151.0)
  - [ThinkLP partnering with Flock Safety for law enforcement side, creating potential threat](https://fathom.video/share/nA3yHzH6Bx5oJsA4JUibAHzqABCHuzyn?tab=summary&timestamp=2199.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Follow-up meeting scheduled for Wednesday, July 9th at 9:30am PT](https://fathom.video/share/nA3yHzH6Bx5oJsA4JUibAHzqABCHuzyn?tab=summary&timestamp=2108.0)
  - [GrowthX to send meeting recording and presentation deck](https://fathom.video/share/nA3yHzH6Bx5oJsA4JUibAHzqABCHuzyn?tab=summary&timestamp=2310.0)
  - [GrowthX to demonstrate platform and workflows in next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/nA3yHzH6Bx5oJsA4JUibAHzqABCHuzyn?tab=summary&timestamp=2128.0)
  - [Deeper discussion on potential opportunities and competitive landscape](https://fathom.video/share/nA3yHzH6Bx5oJsA4JUibAHzqABCHuzyn?tab=summary&timestamp=2135.0)
